intro: Dev-call intelligence - the running capture of what our daily calls cover (in-product, carriers/vendors, data & servicing), the goals we're driving, the blockers in the way, and items that still need a task. Auto-summarized from the Gemini call recap.
note: Populated by CIH from the Gemini dev-call recap email after each call. (The site is static - the on-page button loads the last CIH-published notes; CIH regenerates this from the newest Gemini email.)
goals: Decouple account, policy, and participant statuses - make enrollment statuses a subset of policy statuses and lock a definitive policy-status list (adding 'Deceased').
Finish the master-settlor data load - pull missing settlor emails where the settlor is not the insured, and overwrite trust names/EINs with verified Provident data so DBR can reprocess.
Close the illustrated-surrender-value gaps - run Tranche 67+ now and clean up the nine Tranche-66 policies still missing data.
Ship the Payments Center incrementally - land the new payment UI (annual baselines, audit history, rejection workflow) and sync its fields into Tranche Management and ePay for reporting.
Clean up policy-data hygiene - standardize dropped/declined-policy statuses and trunch handling, and retire non-enforced older-tranche policies by treating them as prospects.

blockers.title: Carrier systematic-allocation-change form has a hard Sept 26 deadline
blockers.ask: Decide between the two handling options (stop new + terminate existing on the next monthly transfer vs. stop new + run existing to depletion) and complete client/agent outreach to move off monthly crediting before the form takes effect; Judy clarifying with the carrier Thursday.

blockers.title: No agreed protocol for agents who move to competitors while keeping client business
blockers.ask: Management to define how client accounts are handled - including whether to disclose the change to clients - when an agent leaves for a competitor.

blockers.title: Bank Dropbox/Egnyte document locations still undefined - blocks trunch/client file uploads
blockers.ask: Finalize where each document type lands so trunch + client files upload correctly (final docs to carrier when sent per client; trunch-specific docs pull at trunch-master stage).

blockers.title: DBR reprocessing still waiting on the master-settlor data load
blockers.ask: Pull the missing master-settlor emails (settlor not the insured) and overwrite trust names/EINs from the Provident list, then reprocess (Mohit / Olivia). No update this call.

needs_tasked.t: Carrier systematic-allocation-change form - pick a handling option and build the client/agent outreach
Protocol for handling clients of agents who move to competitors (define with management)
Agent offboarding / access-revocation + session-history review process
Low-point-vs-bank-data discrepancy on National Life & Allianz illustrations

latest_call.title: Dev Meeting
latest_call.lede: Sprint + servicing call. Headlines: declined/inactive policies will keep their original trunch number via a holding trunch (no new trunch) and drop folders move under account management; a new carrier systematic-allocation-change form is due Sept 26, with two handling options being weighed and client/agent outreach planned to move accounts off monthly crediting; the Kaizen custom-design wizard is being simplified to a direct death-benefit entry and employer-contribution display is being cleaned up in the estimator (NIWD-1772); an allocation-combination bug (NIWD-904) was traced to outdated staging rates; and a departing agent's account and admin access were disabled, with session history under review ahead of a possible non-compete review.

items.text: Dropped policies & trunch status: declined or inactive policies retain their original trunch number in a holding trunch instead of moving to a new one; drop folders to live under account management (not per-trunch); Prospects-tab drop functionality retained.
Kaizen custom-design wizard: drop the contribution-vs-death-benefit page in favor of a direct death-benefit entry field; confirmed ready for implementation.
Employer contribution UI: simplify how employer contributions display in the estimator; approved into the sprint.
Estimator table rating: the bug is believed resolved by recent changes; awaiting final confirmation before the task is closed.

Action-item notes: add a notes field when an agent or client requests illustration changes so requests are trackable (they currently land in the illustration inbox); confirm whether notes should also show on the action item itself.
Estimator to agent portal: add a 'Create Invitation' CTA to Estimator results - dependent on adding the standalone Estimator to the agent portal (NIWD-1792); link the two tasks.
GWT Gifter portal: remove the 'Verify' status label; task likely to be deleted pending final input.

Systematic allocation change form: a new carrier form is due Sept 26; two options are being weighed - stop new accounts and terminate existing ones on the next monthly transfer date, vs. stop new accounts and let existing ones run to depletion. Judy to clarify with the carrier Thursday.
Client/agent outreach: reach out to agents and clients on monthly crediting to move off systematic allocation accounts before the new form takes effect.

Low point data: low-point values differ from bank data on National Life and Allianz illustrations; renewal data is handled differently from first-year. Kyle to test against sample illustrations and may build a scrap report.
Allocation combination bug: a specific allocation combination is failing; traced to outdated rates in staging. Kyle to update the rates, retest the sample payload, and comment on the task.

Bank Dropbox uploads: uploading trunch + client files to the bank Dropbox; document locations still being defined - final docs go to the carrier when sent per client, and trunch-specific docs pull at the trunch-master stage.
Payments Center sync: sync monthly installment due-date changes to ePay transaction requests and existing notification schedules; moved into the new sprint.
Statement data: review the statement-data task and provide a progress update tonight.

Agent offboarding & access review: a departing agent's account and admin access were disabled; session/login history is under review for proprietary-document access ahead of a possible non-compete review.
Declined or inactive policies keep their original trunch number (holding trunch) rather than moving to a new one.
Drop functionality in the Prospects tab is retained.
Client and agent outreach to run before the Sept 26 allocation-form deadline.
Kaizen custom-design wizard to use a direct death-benefit entry field.
Employer-contribution display to be simplified in the estimator.
A departing agent's account and admin access to be disabled immediately following departure.

themes.name: Agent Offboarding & Access Review
themes.latest: A departing agent's account and admin access were disabled. Session/login history is under review to determine whether proprietary documents were accessed before the account was disabled, ahead of a possible non-compete review. Broader protocol for agents moving to competitors to be defined with management.

themes.name: Systematic Allocation Change Form (Sept 26)
themes.latest: New carrier allocation-change form due Sept 26. Two options being weighed (stop new + terminate existing on next monthly transfer vs. stop new + run existing to depletion). Client/agent outreach planned to move off monthly crediting; Judy clarifying with the carrier Thursday.

themes.name: Dropped Policies & Trunch Status
themes.latest: Declined/inactive policies keep their original trunch number via a holding trunch (no new trunch); drop folders to live under account management, not per-trunch; Prospects-tab drop functionality retained.

themes.name: Allocation Combination Bug
themes.latest: A specific allocation combination is failing; traced to outdated rates in staging. Kyle to update staging rates, retest the sample payload, and comment on the task.

themes.name: Kaizen Custom Design Wizard
themes.latest: Wizard UI to drop the contribution-vs-death-benefit page in favor of a direct death-benefit entry field; confirmed ready for implementation.

themes.name: Employer Contribution UI
themes.latest: Estimator to display employer contributions in a simplified format; approved into the sprint.

themes.name: Estimator Table Rating Support
themes.latest: Bug believed resolved by recent changes; awaiting final confirmation before the task can be closed.

themes.name: Low Point Data (NLG / Allianz)
themes.latest: Low-point values differ from bank data on National Life and Allianz illustrations; renewal data handled differently from first-year. Kyle testing against sample illustrations, with the option to build a scrap report.

themes.name: Action Item Notes on Illustration Changes
themes.latest: Add a notes field when agents/clients request illustration changes so requests are trackable (today they land in the illustration inbox). Kyle to confirm whether notes should also show on the action item.

themes.name: Estimator to Agent-Portal Invitations
themes.latest: 'Create Invitation' CTA from Estimator results, dependent on adding the standalone Estimator to the agent portal (NIWD-1792); tasks to be linked.

themes.name: Payments Center to ePay / Notifications Sync
themes.latest: Sync monthly installment due-date changes to ePay transaction requests and existing notification schedules; moved into the new sprint.

themes.name: GWT Gifter Portal - Verify Label
themes.latest: Removal of the 'Verify' status label; task likely to be deleted pending final input.

themes.name: Bank Dropbox / Client File Uploads
themes.latest: Uploading trunch + client files to the bank Dropbox; document locations still being defined. Final docs go to the carrier when sent per client; trunch-specific docs pull at the trunch-master stage.

themes.name: Missing Statements & Scraper Data Gaps
themes.latest: Statement-data task to be reviewed with a progress update tonight; batch request to National Life and date-logic fix still in play.

themes.name: DBR / Master-Settlor Data Load
themes.latest: Master-settlor emails to be pulled where the settlor is not the insured, and trust names/EINs overwritten from the verified Provident list; DBR task updated to require emails so it can reprocess. No update this call.

themes.name: Status Decoupling & Policy Statuses
themes.latest: Account, policy, and participant statuses to be decoupled - enrollment statuses become a subset of policy statuses while account status is separated. Team to lock a definitive policy-status list and add 'Deceased'. No update this call.

themes.name: Payments Center & Tranche Mgmt Integration
themes.latest: New payment UI demoed - annual baselines, expectation statuses, rejection workflow with supporting-doc requests, and full audit history. To be mapped into Tranche Management (with a link to the payments page) and released in stages. No update this call.

themes.name: Illustrated Surrender Values (Tranche 66/67)
themes.latest: Tranche 66 pulled with 9 of 94 missing data (5 missing policy numbers, 4 missing a data row); approved to run Tranche 67+ while the Tranche-66 gaps are cleaned up. No update this call.

Carrier systematic-allocation-change form - Sept 26 deadline; pick a handling option + run client/agent outreach off monthly crediting
